svg.text: Add a Tip for Your Server
Tips go directly to your server. Thank you!
Scan to tip on your own device
Server: Sarah M. · Shift started 4:00 PM · ● Active
Send post-payment tip request to any closed table
id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
tip_token uuid UNIQUE -- token embedded in QR URL
tip_qr_sent_at timestamptz -- when QR was generated & sent
QR tip links expire after 24 hours · Tips captured via Stripe PaymentIntent · Edge Function: confirm-tip
